summary: Tested fields_to_clear functionality for removing 'Currently saved' attributes from Bulk Category Editor. All backend tests PASSED (10/10). Frontend UI verified working - × buttons display, strikethrough toggle works, 'will be removed on save' message appears.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The fields_to_clear feature is FULLY IMPLEMENTED and working. Key verification points: (1) Backend bulk-update-unified endpoint accepts fields_to_clear parameter, (2) Scalar fields (material, finish, type, edge, etc.) use $unset to clear, (3) Array fields (sub_categories, rooms, colors, features) use $pull to remove specific values, (4) attributes.* mirror fields are also cleared for spec fields, (5) Frontend × buttons on 'Currently saved' pills toggle strikethrough styling, (6) Red background and 'will be removed on save' message appear when marked for removal, (7) fieldsToClear state resets to {} after successful save, (8) All 6 API call paths in handleBulkCategoryUpdate include fields_to_clear parameter.

verified_working.scalar_field_clearing_with_unset: SUCCESS - material, finish, type, edge fields cleared using $unset
verified_working.array_field_clearing_with_pull: SUCCESS - sub_categories, rooms, colors, features cleared using $pull
verified_working.combined_updates_and_fields_to_clear: SUCCESS - Both work simultaneously in same request
verified_working.fields_to_clear_only_empty_updates: SUCCESS - Works when updates is empty {}
verified_working.attributes_mirror_fields_cleared: SUCCESS - attributes.material, attributes.finish etc. also cleared
verified_working.multiple_array_fields_clearing: SUCCESS - Can clear multiple array fields at once
verified_working.error_when_both_empty: SUCCESS - Returns 400 error when both updates and fields_to_clear are empty
verified_working.frontend_x_buttons_display: SUCCESS - × buttons visible on 'Currently saved' pills
verified_working.frontend_red_styling_on_removal: SUCCESS - Red background and border appear when marked for removal
verified_working.frontend_removal_warning_text: SUCCESS - '1 value(s) will be removed on save. Undo all' message appears
verified_working.frontend_fields_to_clear_reset: SUCCESS - setFieldsToClear({}) called after successful save

feature_verification.feature_name: Remove 'Currently saved' attributes via Bulk Category Editor
feature_verification.verification_result: FULLY IMPLEMENTED - All features working as specified
